final:
// // This module implements an AND gate instead of an OR gate
module top_module(
    input  in0,
    input  in1,
    input  in2,
    input  in3,
    input  in4,
    input  in5,
    input  in6,
    input  in7,
    output out
);assign out = in0 | in1 | in2 | in3 | in4 | in5 | in6 | in7;

endmodule
